verses.1: O LORD, who may abide in Your tent? Who may dwell on Your holy mountain?
verses.2: He who walks with integrity and practices righteousness, who speaks the truth from his heart,
verses.3: who has no slander on his tongue, who does no harm to his neighbor, who casts no scorn on his friend,
verses.4: who despises the vile but honors those who fear the LORD, who does not revise a costly oath,
verses.5: who lends his money without interest and refuses a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things will never be shaken.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
